headline: Is Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Appealing After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Abbott Laboratories at around US$100 a share still reflects its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is built to help you frame that question clearly. The stock has recently pulled back, with a 2.5% decline over the last 7 days and a 9.0% decline over the last 30 days, contributing to a 19.5% decline over the last year. Recent news coverage has focused on Abbott Laboratories as a large, diversified healthcare name that often features in discussions...
